author: Jdub
content:
Gameplan March 14th 

Consumer Sentiment today at 10:00AM EST. With this gap in the markets we are going to be waiting for this today. Every pop has been shorted and we will continue to look for pop and fades. 

Key levels coming into market open are the 476 on the QQQ and 558 on SPY. What I would like to see is the reaction off those levels coming into 10:00AM 

As for the main watches today it will be NVDA. This one is showing strength compared to the markets. What I would like to see is consolidation right off the bat or pullback on this name. Lets see if the first pullback gets bought up. 

TSLA key levels are going to be 242. Also keep an eye out for the PDH on this one. 

AAPL still staying heavy keep an eye out for the reaction off the 211.24 for a pop and fade. 

For the rest of the names keep and eye out for the markets. 

Remember its a Friday plus we have red folder at 10:00AM 

@everyone

author: Jdub
content:
Gameplan August 29th 

Coming into market open you can see that we had a drop overnight. We recently just had Core PCE as well. 

The levels that we have coming into today here are fairly clear for the SPY and the QQQ. 

If we want to look for longs we will be looking for the reclaim back above the previous aths on the ES. 

AS for my top watches today they will be the indices themselves. 

On the tech side I'm cautious for longs since the QQQ has been lagging the overall spy on this move higher. 

I do like AAPL and GOOG if we can reclaim above key levels for continuation @everyone

author: Jdub
content:
Gameplan December 16th 

Coming into market open today we had some news in the pre market with red folder. We also had the contracts rollover as well. 

What I would like to see coming into today is the reaction that we have off the PDL on both the SPY and QQQ. 

609 on the QQQ and SPY 679.5 

As for my top watches its going to be the same as yesterday. 

TSLA I would like to see the reclaim back above the 474 for a push higher. 

As for the rest of the names keep an eye out for the PDH and PDL. 

Lets wait for the first 15 minutes to develop in the markets and wait for a clear direction to form. 

@everyone
